# TixHawk

> Last-minute concert and event ticket alerts.

TixHawk is a ticket alert service that monitors sold-out events and sends instant notifications when tickets become available.

## What It Does

- Monitors ticket availability for sold-out events
- Sends real-time alerts when tickets drop
- Tracks concerts, sports, theater, and other events
- No hidden fees - $7/month flat rate

## Use Cases

- Finding last-minute concert tickets
- Getting alerts for sold-out sports games
- Tracking ticket availability for popular shows
- Never missing your favorite artists

## Pricing

$7/month for unlimited event tracking

## Company

Built by Diger Studios
https://digerstudios.com

## Links

Website: https://tixhawk.com
